creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Burj Khalifa is amazing, but have you seen it with dancing laser lights? It’s even more mesmerizing! 🤩

Don’t miss the laser and lights show on Burj Khalifa this winter. Here are the timings:
🗓️ Wednesday to Sunday, until March 31, 2023
🕖 7:45pm, 8:45pm and 9:45pm

📸 Our viewing spots:
* SALT Dubai Mall terrace
* Time Out Market, Souk Al Bahar

Tag your fam and besties!
